Source   Edit  

Fleet management for EC4X

This module defines fleets which are collections of squadrons that can move together and engage in combat as a unit.

ARCHITECTURE FIX (2025-11-23):

  • Combat squadrons and spacelift ships are now SEPARATE
  • Fleet → Squadrons (combat units) + SpaceLiftShips (transport/colonization)
  • Per operations.md:288, spacelift ships are screened during combat

Imports

ship, squadron, spacelift, ../common/types/core, ../common/types/combat

Types

Fleet = object
  id*: FleetId
  squadrons*: seq[Squadron]
  spaceLiftShips*: seq[SpaceLiftShip]
  owner*: HouseId
  location*: SystemId
A collection of squadrons and spacelift ships that move together Source   Edit  

Procs

proc `$`(f: Fleet): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of a fleet Source   Edit   
proc add(f: var Fleet; squadron: Squadron) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a squadron to the fleet Source   Edit   
proc canTraverse(f: Fleet; laneType: LaneType): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if the fleet can traverse a specific type of jump lane Per operations.md:9 "Fleets containing crippled ships or Spacelift Command ships can not jump across restricted lanes" Source   Edit   
proc clear(f: var Fleet) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Remove all squadrons from the fleet Source   Edit   
proc combatSquadrons(f: Fleet): seq[Squadron] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all combat-capable squadrons Source   Edit   
proc combatStrength(f: Fleet): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate the total attack strength of the fleet Source   Edit   
proc crippledSquadrons(f: Fleet): seq[Squadron] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all squadrons with crippled flagships Source   Edit   
proc effectiveSquadrons(f: Fleet): seq[Squadron] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all squadrons with non-crippled flagships Source   Edit   
proc hasCombatShips(f: Fleet): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if the fleet has any combat-capable squadrons Source   Edit   
proc hasTransportShips(f: Fleet): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if the fleet has any operational spacelift ships ARCHITECTURE FIX: Spacelift ships are now separate from squadrons Source   Edit   
proc isEmpty(f: Fleet): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if the fleet has no squadrons Source   Edit   
proc len(f: Fleet): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the number of squadrons in the fleet Source   Edit   
proc merge(f1: var Fleet; f2: Fleet) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Merge another fleet into this one ARCHITECTURE FIX: Merge both squadrons and spacelift ships Source   Edit   
proc newFleet(squadrons: seq[Squadron] = @[];
              spaceLiftShips: seq[SpaceLiftShip] = @[]; id: FleetId = "";
              owner: HouseId = ""; location: SystemId = 0): Fleet {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new fleet with the given squadrons and spacelift ships Source   Edit   
proc remove(f: var Fleet; index: int) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Remove a squadron at the given index Source   Edit   
proc spaceLiftShipsSeq(f: Fleet): seq[SpaceLiftShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all spacelift ships ARCHITECTURE FIX: Renamed from transportSquadrons, returns SpaceLiftShips not Squadrons Source   Edit   
proc split(f: var Fleet; indices: seq[int]): Fleet {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Split off squadrons at the given indices into a new fleet Source   Edit   
proc transportCapacity(f: Fleet): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate the number of operational spacelift ships ARCHITECTURE FIX: Spacelift ships are now separate from squadrons Source   Edit  

Exports

FleetId, SystemId, HouseId, LaneType, Squadron, EnhancedShip, ShipClass, SpaceLiftShip, SpaceLiftCargo, CargoType
